jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Laurus Labs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
